title: Module 1
content:
Introduction to Industry 4.0 : Introduction to the Fourth Industrial
Revolution, Evolution from Industry 1.0 to Industry 4.0, Key Components of
Industry 4.0: IoT, Big Data, AI, Robotics, and Cyber-Physical Systems,
Industry 4.0 Technologies and their Impact on Manufacturing and Supply
Chain, Smart Factories and Smart Manufacturing

title: Module 2
content:
Internet of Things (IoT) and Cyber-Physical Systems: Introduction to IoT:
Concepts and Architecture, Sensors, Actuators, and IoT Devices,
Communication Protocols: MQTT, CoAP, and HTTP, Cyber-Physical
Systems: Integration and Application, IoT Security and Challenges

title: Module 3
content:
Big Data and Artificial Intelligence in Industry 4.0:
Big Data Analytics: Concepts and Tools, Data Collection, Storage, and
Processing, Introduction to Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, AI
Applications in Industry 4.0: Predictive Maintenance, Quality Control, and
Autonomous Systems, Case Studies and Real-world Applications

title: Module 4
content:
Robotics, Automation, and Future Trends: Basics of Robotics and
Automation, Types of Industrial Robots and their Applications, Automation
in Manufacturing: CNC, PLC, and SCADA Systems, Future Trends: Digital
Twins, Augmented Reality, and Blockchain in Industry 4.0, Ethical, Legal,
and Social Implications
